feature.name: Pricing rules engine
feature.description: Extract VibeShop line-item pricing rules (category, tier, membership) as a standalone package.
included_behaviors: compute line totals from unit price, quantity, and category
apply category multipliers from pricing config
apply highest applicable quantity tier multiplier
apply membership discount when PricingContext.is_member is true
round totals using configured decimal precision
excluded_behaviors: global app factory and middleware clutter
original project tests and CLI entrypoints

entanglement.description: Correct pricing lives behind duplicate helpers in utils.py and pulls tier/category rules from YAML-backed global config spread across pricing modules.
signals: three similarly named pricing functions with only one correct semantics
pricing rules read merged config from GLOBAL_STATE by default
routes and services import pricing through mixed indirection paths

output.signature: compute_line_price(unit_price: float, quantity: int, category: str, *, context: PricingContext | None = None) -> float
